summary: Pinned Tools feature on Hub page - CORE FUNCTIONALITY VERIFIED. Tested: (1) Hub page loads with profile card and all 9 accordion sections, (2) Bookmark icons visible on each menu item (outline when unpinned, filled when pinned), (3) Clicking bookmark icon pins the item - 'Pinned' section appears at top of Hub with item as chip, (4) Pinned chips have subtle colored border matching item color, (5) Pinned section appears ABOVE Recently Visited, (6) Bottom tab bar works correctly, (7) Accordion expand/collapse works. Note: Long-press unpin and persistence across navigation tested via code review - implementation is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: more.tsx lines 78-85: Pinned tools state properly defined with MAX_PINNED=6 limit
more.tsx lines 111-127: togglePin() correctly handles pin/unpin logic - removes oldest when exceeding MAX_PINNED
more.tsx line 129: isPinned() helper correctly checks if item is pinned by title
more.tsx lines 708-723: Bookmark icon TouchableOpacity correctly uses e.stopPropagation() to prevent parent navigation
more.tsx lines 717-721: Bookmark icon correctly shows 'bookmark' (filled) when pinned, 'bookmark-outline' when not
more.tsx lines 860-890: Pinned section renders above Recently Visited with correct data-testid='pinned-tools-section'
more.tsx line 869: Pinned chips have borderColor with 30% opacity of item color (subtle colored border)
more.tsx line 876: onLongPress correctly calls togglePin() to unpin
more.tsx lines 893-895: Recently Visited correctly filters out pinned items to avoid duplication
AsyncStorage keys properly namespaced per user: hub_pinned_{userId}

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Core features verified, some features tested via code review only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pinned Tools feature fully implemented. Key implementation: (1) Pins stored in AsyncStorage with key 'hub_pinned_{userId}', (2) togglePin() called from bookmark TouchableOpacity inside each menu item, (3) Pinned section renders above Recently Visited with chips, (4) Each chip has onLongPress to unpin, (5) Recently Visited filters out pinned items. Testing note: Playwright tests work but browser session doesn't persist between script runs - need to include login in each test script. Pin button clicks work using coordinate clicks ~45px from right edge of menu item row.
